name: elkasir
description: Elkasir monorepo (POS F&B) — apps/web (React 19 + Tailwind 4) + apps/api (Go modular monolith) + packages/api-contract (OpenAPI) + packages/shared. No Turborepo, no TanStack.

scripts.build: npm run build:web && node scripts/embed-web.mjs && npm run build:api
scripts.sqlc:generate: cd apps/api && go run github.com/sqlc-dev/sqlc/cmd/sqlc@v1.27.0 generate
scripts.gen: npm run sqlc:generate && npm run gen:contract
